body:
gazeldhazel:

do things to a cute girl -> she reacts cutely -> makes you want to do even more things to her -> do things to a cute girl

I feel like there’s a step missing in there:

-> she reacts cutely -> giggle and bury your face into her since you made her do that -> makes you want to do even more things to her
